scope: The launch window of WeForge: the initial platform commit through the first month of operation, including the May outage as recorded — and as not recorded — by the surviving sources.

corpus_map.description: The platform repository: initial commit, service scaffolding, deployment configuration.
The platform's own meta tracker: launch announcement, service requests, the outage report.
Hand-kept operations journal. Entries are dated but irregular; several weeks have no entries at all.

corpus_gaps.description: No deployment log or postmortem covers the recovery from the May outage; the tracker records the outage opening but nothing records how service was restored.
corpus_gaps.gap_evidence: tracker:weforge/meta#41 reports the outage and was closed without a resolution comment; docs/ops-journal.md has no entry between May 12 and May 27.
